problem: Beyond Intelligence notebook (b8896972) synthesizes memory failure literature (MemFail, episodic-first, mixture routing). agent-rules had memory_engine and trajectory RL but no failure-mode attribution, mixture routing doc, verifier usage ledger, or MemFail harness adapter.
solution: Fifth incorporation slice: episodic-first policy, failure_mode ingest tags, MEMORY_MIXTURE_ROUTING, verifier learning loop (ledger + bridge + live Rcml + sklearn assist), MemFail adapter smoke, Phase 4 neural deferred brief.

user_stories.description: BEYOND_INTELLIGENCE_MAP.md links notebook concepts to repo artifacts with P0/P1/P2.
Episodic-first: MEMORY.md consolidation only on milestone; no force-abstract without eval gate.
verifier_usage_ledger.jsonl records SkillLens + LARGER hook decisions.
memfail_adapter.py implements MemFail 3-fn API over memory_engine.
VERIFIER_LEARNING_LOOP.md connects gap pipeline, trajectory RL, relation-conditioned map.

technical_decisions.decision: Neural verifier/memory training deferred to VERIFIER_NEURAL_TRAINING_DEFERRED.md (review 2026-07-08).
